title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.280 - Insolvency or removal from state of surety, proceedings
text:
426.280.  Insolvency or removal from state of surety, proceedings. — The like proceedings as are prescribed in sections 426.260 and 426.270 may be had whenever it shall appear to the court that any person who shall have become security for any assignee, in any bond given for the due execution of his trust, has or is likely to become insolvent, or has removed, or is about to remove from the state.
(RSMo 1939 § 5766) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5656; 1919 § 652; 1909 § 925
